channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 4 inch deep hot hole which takes up most of the road in broken up tarmac, 6th June
item.description:
If coming from Birdlip Village halfway up Hill postcode for the Road is GL4 8LH
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain still blocked - by substation on Wellington Lane, 6th June
item.description:
The drain opposite Number 24 is blocked, this was previously reported, however it has now got worse, with weeds now growing out of the drain. Creating lots of surface water / flooding risk during heavy rain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Wellington Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The path should be 2m wide as it is a bridleway - currently it is 6” and the crop is oats which will grow to 5ft, 6th June
item.description:
Gloucestershire Way bridleway from A435 up to Upper Coberley. What three words: sourcing.mistress.eyebrows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle of road very deep between cats eyes and road on edge next to house has now eroded to give a drop on the white line, 6th June
item.description:
Outside of new house- Suomi- Road has eroded so bad it’s not only very dangerous for cyclists but also cars and motorbikes- especially when they over take other cycles and hit the dip in the middle of the road- they swerve as the tyres drop into the eroded highway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

Promenade Cheltenham towards the rear of the taxi rank

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Street lights out Warden Hill Rd, 6th June
item.description:
A number of street lights are out in Warden Hill Rd and have been for some days. Need fixing asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Glass shatte, 6th June
item.description:
Bus stop. Cirencester Road. By Lidl. Broken glass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 253, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface vibration from heavy vehicles on Village Road, causing property damage, 6th June
item.description:
There is a dip and crazing (cracking) in the road surface on Village Road, on the section affected by the chicane where traffic is funnelled into a single lane. When heavy vehicles — particularly buses on the frequent town-centre service — pass over this area, it causes significant vibration to nearby properties. The vibration is felt daily and is most noticeable in the mornings and evenings when buses travel at higher speeds in lighter traffic. It is strong enough to shake furniture inside the home. This has resulted in cracking to plasterwork in the stairwell and bedroom ceiling of my property, and several other households along this stretch have reported the same vibration and similar damage. The same defect appeared on this section of road some years ago and was resolved by resurfacing; the problem has since recurred. This issue has been ongoing and worsening over recent months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The grass verge outside number 33 Brooklyn Road has been removed and is going to be tarmacked also the paving slabs there are now all broken or dislodged, 6th June
item.description:
Outside number 33 Brooklyn Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the corner of the road outside number 1, 6th June
item.description:
The pavement was broken by the new people that has moved in to number 1 Hebden close they was using diggers and stream roller to do their garden and has broken the pavement and now it a trip hazard and is a blind person or has disability could trip over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hebden Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Dangerous damage to paving on right of way next to main drain, 6th June
item.description:
The right of way is outside the back of No12 Croft Avenue between the house and the detached garden. The paving near the severn trent drain is severely damaged and moves when you step on it. There is a hole in the middle and it looks like the paving will collapse. Children use this right of way regularly. I have emailed land registry to see who is responsible and they said: The strip of passageway between the two parts of your registered title GR242209 is not registered. There also appears to be no mention of maintenance responsibility on the title register.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Croft Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged tree after storm, 6th June
item.description:
Outside front door of 68 the cornfields

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, The Cornfields, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Planning board not visible, 6th June
item.description:
Hi as you come along the road, with Morrisons supermarket to your left, as you approach the roundabout, the planning board for the roundabout is masked by low hanging branches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Up Hatherley Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of dog bins, 6th June
item.description:
There are no dog bins along this route and the nearest are at the children’s playground and because of this they are frequently full and overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Furrow Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
